channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [THOMASCOOK] Thomas Cook (India) Ltd Grants 13,70,000 Stock Options Under ESOP 2024 – EXECOM
item.description:
Thomas Cook (India) Ltd has granted 13,70,000 stock options to certain eligible employees pursuant to the Thomas Cook Employees Stock Option Scheme 2024 - EXECOM (ESOP 2024 – EXECOM). The options, upon vesting, are exercisable within a period of 20 years. Each Stock Option is convertible into one fully paid-up equity share having a face value of Re 1/- each. The equity shares allotted, pursuant to the exercise of the Stock Options, would not be subject to lock-in. The scheme is in compliance with the SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021.

  • Thomas Cook (India) Ltd grants 13,70,000 stock options to certain eligible employees.
  • The options are granted under the Thomas Cook Employees Stock Option Scheme 2024 - EXECOM (ESOP 2024 – EXECOM).
  • Each Stock Option is convertible into one fully paid-up equity share having a face value of Re 1/- each.
  • The options, upon vesting, are exercisable within a period of 20 years.
  • The scheme is in compliance with the SEBI (Share Based Employee Benefits and Sweat Equity) Regulations, 2021.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THOMAS COOK (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [SUNCITYSY] Suncity Synthetics Ltd Announces Preferential Allotment of Shares Post Reduction of Capital
item.description:
Suncity Synthetics Ltd has announced a preferential allotment of shares amounting to Rs. 3,00,00,000/- to various proposed allottees. The allotment is not subject to any corporate action arising out of any reduction of capital connected with the company petition No. 250/MB/2025. The new share capital of the company will consist of 31,00,000 Equity shares of Rs. 10/- each, post preferential allotment. The proposal is subject to the approval of the Members of the Company and such regulatory/ statutory authorities as may be applicable.

  • Suncity Synthetics Ltd announces preferential allotment of shares worth Rs. 3,00,00,000/-
  • The allotment is not subject to any corporate action arising out of any reduction of capital connected with the company petition No. 250/MB/2025
  • The new share capital of the company will consist of 31,00,000 Equity shares of Rs. 10/- each, post preferential allotment
  • The proposal is subject to the approval of the Members of the Company and such regulatory/ statutory authorities as may be applicable
  • The company has fixed Monday, 30t March, 2026 as Relevant Date for the Preferential Issue

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNCITY SYNTHETICS LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [WAAREEINDO] Chief Financial Officer, Sonal Shrivastava, Resigns from Indosolar Ltd
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Sonal Shrivastava, the Chief Financial Officer and Key Managerial Personnel of Indosolar Ltd, has resigned from her position effective from March 20, 2026. The resignation was tendered for reasons mentioned in her resignation letter. The company has complied with the necessary regulations and has disclosed the information as per Schedule III – Para A(7B) of Part A of the Listing Regulations.

  • Sonal Shrivastava resigns from her position as Chief Financial Officer and Key Managerial Personnel of Indosolar Ltd.
  • The resignation is effective from March 20, 2026.
  • The resignation was tendered for reasons mentioned in her resignation letter.
  • The company has complied with the necessary regulations and has disclosed the information as per Schedule III – Para A(7B) of Part A of the Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indosolar Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SUNCITYSY] Suncity Synthetics Ltd Announces Preferential Allotment of Shares Post Reduction of Capital
item.description:
Suncity Synthetics Ltd held a Board Meeting on 20th March 2026, where they approved several matters. The company has applied for a reduction of share capital, which is pending before the NCLT. They proposed a preferential issue of shares, which is not part of any earlier reduction of capital petition. The new share capital will consist of 31,00,000 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each, post preferential allotment. The preferential issue of shares will be for 30,00,000 equity shares at a price of Rs. 10/- each. The proposed allottees include Sumita Mishra, Bharat Kumar Mardia, Devendra Batukanath Shukla, Saroj Kumar Choudhury, Nirav Dahyabhai Vekariya, Dobariya Hardik Bholabhai, Khushal Prakashbhai Talaviya, Chirag Sachapara, Thummar Hardik Dineshbhai, Manas Dash, Manas Ranjan Palo, and Sachin Shankar Shivgan. The company has fixed Monday, 30th March, 2026 as the Relevant Date for the Preferential Issue and decided to provide e-voting facility to the shareholders for the ensuing Extraordinary General Meeting through CSDL platform.

  • Suncity Synthetics Ltd has applied for a reduction of share capital.
  • The company proposed a preferential issue of shares post reduction of capital.
  • The new share capital will consist of 31,00,000 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each, post preferential allotment.
  • The preferential issue of shares will be for 30,00,000 equity shares at a price of Rs. 10/- each.
  • The company has fixed Monday, 30th March, 2026 as the Relevant Date for the Preferential Issue.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNCITY SYNTHETICS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [WAAREEENER] Waaree Energies Ltd: Change in Management - New CEO and CFO Appointed
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Waaree Energies Ltd has announced a change in its management. Mr. Amit Ashok Paithankar, the Whole-Time Director and Chief Executive Officer, has mutually agreed to resign from his position effective immediately. The Board has approved the appointment of Mr. Jignesh Devchandbhai Rathod as the new Whole-Time Director and Chief Executive Officer, subject to shareholder approval. Ms. Sonal Shrivastava has resigned from her position as the Chief Financial Officer, and Mr. Abhishek Pareek has been appointed as the new CFO. Additionally, Mr. Munna Singh and Mr. Varun Goenka have been appointed as Deputy Chief Financial Officer and President – Growth & Strategy, respectively.

  • Mr. Amit Ashok Paithankar resigns as Whole-Time Director and CEO
  • Mr. Jignesh Devchandbhai Rathod appointed as new Whole-Time Director and CEO
  • Ms. Sonal Shrivastava resigns as Chief Financial Officer
  • Mr. Abhishek Pareek appointed as new Chief Financial Officer
  • Mr. Munna Singh and Mr. Varun Goenka appointed as Senior Managerial Personnels

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Waaree Energies Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [JRFOODS] JR Foods Ltd Changes Registered Office from Pondicherry to Telangana
item.description:
JR Foods Ltd has changed its registered office from the State of Pondicherry to the State of Telangana as per the order passed by the Regional Director (RD) dated 3rd March 2026. The new registered office address is Level 3 & 4, Plot No 13, Greenlands Colony, Besides Flyover Gachibowli, Hyderabad, India – 500032. The contact number is 1800-8892-877, and the new email ID is cs@Datacipher.com. The new website address is http://www.Datacipher.com. This change is pursuant to Reg. 30 of SEBI (LODR).

  • JR Foods Ltd has changed its registered office from Pondicherry to Telangana.
  • The new registered office address is Level 3 & 4, Plot No 13, Greenlands Colony, Besides Flyover Gachibowli, Hyderabad, India – 500032.
  • The new contact number is 1800-8892-877.
  • The new email ID is cs@Datacipher.com.
  • The new website address is http://www.Datacipher.com.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JR Foods Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [SOLARIUM] Solarium Green Energy Ltd Secures ₹22.5 Crore Purchase Orders for Solar Panels
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Solarium Green Energy Ltd has announced that it has received two new purchase orders dated March 20, 2026 and March 19, 2026. The combined value of these orders is approximately ₹22,50,98,308/- (Rupees Twenty-Two Crore Fifty Lakh Ninety-Eight Thousand Three Hundred Eight Only) exclusive of GST. The first order, received on March 20, 2026, is for the supply of BIS-certified 715/720 Wp Topcon N-type Bifacial Dual Glass Solar Panels for grid connected solar projects in Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, and Andhra Pradesh. The second order, received on March 19, 2026, is for the supply of Solar Panel_Non DCR_Topcon_Half Cut_132 Cell_G12 (715/720 Wp_G to G_Make-Solarium) for projects in Puducherry. These orders reflect the company’s steady business growth and are expected to strengthen revenue visibility and manufacturing capabilities.

  • Solarium Green Energy Ltd has received two new purchase orders worth approximately ₹22.5 crores.
  • The first order is for the supply of BIS-certified 715/720 Wp Topcon N-type Bifacial Dual Glass Solar Panels for projects in Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, and Andhra Pradesh.
  • The second order is for the supply of Solar Panel_Non DCR_Topcon_Half Cut_132 Cell_G12 (715/720 Wp_G to G_Make-Solarium) for projects in Puducherry.
  • These orders reflect the company’s steady business growth and are expected to strengthen revenue visibility and manufacturing capabilities.
  • The combined value of these orders is approximately ₹22,50,98,308/- exclusive of GST.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Solarium Green Energy Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [HIRECT] Hind Rectifiers Ltd Announces 1:1 Bonus Issue for Eligible Shareholders
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hind Rectifiers Ltd has announced a bonus issue of one fully paid-up equity share for every existing share, following shareholder approval through a postal ballot. The record date for determining eligibility is March 27, 2026, with the deemed date of allotment on March 30, 2026. The bonus shares will be available for trading on the next working day, i.e., March 31, 2026.

  • Hind Rectifiers Ltd announces a 1:1 bonus issue for eligible shareholders.
  • The record date for determining eligibility is March 27, 2026.
  • Shareholders approved the bonus issue through a postal ballot.
  • The deemed date of allotment is March 30, 2026.
  • Bonus shares will be available for trading on March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HIND RECTIFIERS LTD. | Category: Bonus

item.title: [THOMASCOOK] Thomas Cook (India) Ltd. Announces Conversion of Inter-company Loan, Appoints New Chief Business Officer and President
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Thomas Cook (India) Ltd. has announced the conversion of an inter-company loan given to its non-material wholly-owned subsidiary, Thomas Cook Lanka (Private) Limited, into Optionally Convertible Cumulative Redeemable Preference Shares (OCCRPS). The company has also appointed Mr. Deepesh Varma as the Chief Business Officer - Foreign Exchange and Senior Management Personnel, and Ms. Deepti Sheth as the President and Group Head - Human Resources and Senior Management Personnel, both effective from April 1, 2026. The board meeting, which commenced at 3.45 P.M. (IST) and concluded at 6.00 P.M. (IST), also discussed other matters including the appointment of Mr. Deepesh Varma and Ms. Deepti Sheth's profiles and details as per the SEBI regulations.

  • Thomas Cook (India) Ltd. to convert inter-company loan to Thomas Cook Lanka (Private) Limited into OCCRPS
  • Mr. Deepesh Varma appointed as Chief Business Officer - Foreign Exchange and Senior Management Personnel
  • Ms. Deepti Sheth appointed as President and Group Head - Human Resources and Senior Management Personnel
  • Appointments effective from April 1, 2026
  • Board meeting discussed appointments and related details

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THOMAS COOK (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MTPL] Marg Techno Projects Ltd. Announces Capital Increase, Rights Issue, and New CFO Appointment
item.description:
Marg Techno Projects Ltd. held a Board of Directors meeting on March 20, 2026, where they approved several significant decisions. The company increased its authorized capital from Rs.30,00,00,000 to Rs.45,00,00,000 by creating an additional 1,50,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10/- each, subject to shareholder approval. The company also plans to raise funds up to Rs.65,00,00,000 through a Rights Issue to eligible equity shareholders. Furthermore, Mr. Arun Madhavan Nair was appointed as the new Chief Financial Officer, replacing Mrs. Chhayaba Balbhadrasinh Dodiya, who resigned from the position. The company also approved alterations to the Other Objects in the Memorandum of Association and increases in remuneration for three key personnel, subject to shareholder approval. An Extra Ordinary General Meeting has been called for Friday, April 17, 2026.

  • Authorized capital increase to Rs.45,00,00,000 with the creation of 1,50,00,000 new Equity Shares
  • Planned Rights Issue to raise funds up to Rs.65,00,00,000
  • Appointment of Mr. Arun Madhavan Nair as the new Chief Financial Officer
  • Alteration of Other Objects in the Memorandum of Association
  • Increases in remuneration for three key personnel subject to shareholder approval

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Marg Techno Projects Ltd | Category: Investment
